potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall start an account as empty when it is first opened.
The system shall activate an account and make it ready to use after setting it up and making an initial deposit.
The system shall allow closing an account after it has become inactive.
The system shall render an account unusable once it is closed.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the account can be closed, and once closed, it is no longer usable.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall render an account unusable after closing.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start an account as empty when it is first opened.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement can be implied from the context and does not need to be explicitly stated.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall activate an account and make it ready to use after setting it up and making an initial deposit.
ambiguities.reason: This is a combination of two separate points in the source text, which can be split into simpler requirements.
